Name: -1_taste_bad_likes_person
Representative_Docs: ['A person with bad taste is someone who enjoys offensive and objectively terrible content. Again, this is subjective. However, If you think watching loads of graphic violence, gross, despicable and ridiculous sexual content, is something enjoyable, you have a bad taste. There is nothing wrong with seeing a terrible act (granted only once), but if you enjoy watching and love seeing it, it is bad taste. Like going on the Dark Web to get your fix (if you know what I mean), it is something that is simply bad taste.', "A friend of mine who doesn't like this new tv show that just started to me would have bad taste.  They aren't enjoying it as much as I do so they have bad taste.", "The one thing that I think this person has is poor taste in the movie genres he watches. He likes to watch Lifetime movies which usually involve men who aren't treating women well and he likes horror movies. He isn't some deviant person and is really nice actually, but I feel he has poor taste in movies. This is really a hard question to answer. The only other thing I can think of is his taste in food. He puts hot sauce on everything he eats and he also like eating moose heart and liver, which is gross."]

Name: 0_taste_bad_poor_things
Representative_Docs: ['My brother has a bad taste, he cannot think which food is good and not good with less taste, also he cannot get the good clothes for him as he has a bad taste of clothes.', "I can't think of anyone with poor taste.", 'I don’t know anyone who has bad taste']

Name: 1_clothes_dress_clothing_just
Representative_Docs: ['I\'m going to pick one of my past co-workers who used to come to work with mismatched clothing & suits. His clothing looked cheaply made & just not nice to look at & he made good money & wasn\'t poor. His desk was always messy & when we went out to lunch his choices in foods were unappealing & kinda "gross"! I just don\'t think he had good taste in many things.', "I have a sister in law who just doesn't have good taste at all. The way she dresses had not a bit of style to it. She mainly just puts her clothes on and goes and they don't flatter her at all. She doesn't try to decorate her home up and put nice touches to it.", "This person dresses in baggy clothes and has a poor taste wear the clothes are not fitted and the fashion is outdated and the clothes don't match well with the shoes and colors."]
